text:
43200 = Assault (homicide) (*U01–
*U02, X85–Y09, Y87.1) 

43300 = Assault (homicide) by drugs, 
biological substances, and other 
and unspecified noxious 
substances (*U01.6–*U01.7, 
X85–X90) 

43400 = Assault (homicide) by hanging, 
strangulation and suffocation 
(X91) 

43500 = Assault (homicide) by discharge 
of firearms (*U01.4, X93–X95) 

43600 = Assault (homicide) by sharp 
object (X99) 
 43700 = Assault (homicide) by blunt object 
(Y00) 

43800 = Assault (homicide) by bodily force
